A multilingual childminding service where children grow, learn and thrive in a safe, caring and stimulating environment.

Our Approach Book a Visit

Multilingual Learning

Portuguese and Spanish through fun and play.

Child-Centred

Every child is unique. We support every step.

Play to Learn

Hands-on activities that inspire discovery.

Strong Partnerships

Working closely with parents and families.

Our Children's Future

Warm care, clear structure, curious learning.

Little Wise Kids combines a home-from-home environment with child-led discovery, early years learning and modern languages.

1

Home-from-home

A warm setting with convenient access to town and local amenities.

2

Confident learners

A curriculum that helps each child recognise and cultivate their talents.

3

Modern languages

Traditional Early Years learning with Portuguese, Spanish and culture woven in.

Nurturing Little Minds, Inspiring Bright Futures

Every day is a chance to learn, grow and shine at Little Wise Kids.

Multilingual Learning

Languages introduced through songs, stories and everyday moments.

Safe & Caring

Secure, nurturing environments where children feel loved and respected.

Creative Play

Art, music and hands-on exploration that build confidence and curiosity.

Parent Partnership

Close family partnerships that support each child's unique journey.

FAQ

Got Questions?

Clear answers to the things parents most often ask before joining Little Wise Kids.

What ages do you care for?

We care for children from 6 months to 5 years old in a safe and engaging environment.

How are languages introduced?

Portuguese and Spanish are introduced through songs, stories, play and everyday routines.

What are your opening hours?

We are open Monday to Friday from 7:00 to 18:00, including school holidays.

Where are you based?

Little Wise Kids is based in a home setting just behind Cabot Circus car park.

Photo Gallery

A CMS-ready gallery scaffold for joyful moments, learning and adventures.

Term dates and hours

When we're open and welcoming

Everything you need to plan your child's week with us, at a glance.

Open today
7:00-18:00

Monday to Friday, every week of the year

This week at a glance

MonTueWedThuFriSatSun

A morning with us - playful, warm and full of little discoveries.

School term dates

  1. 1 Term 1 5 September - 21 October
  2. 2 Term 2 31 October - 16 December
  3. 3 Term 3 3 January - 10 February
  4. 4 Term 4 20 February - 31 March
  5. 5 Term 5 17 April - 26 May
  6. 6 Term 6 5 June - 21 July

Growing confident, kind and curious children.

A safe, nurturing space where every child is supported to learn, explore and thrive.
